mapper.sql: SELECT R.REQUEST_KEY ,R.CRET_DT ,'1' AS FORM_TYPE_CD ,R.OPER_TYPE_CD ,R.PRO_STTUS_CD AS PROC_CD ,C.CSTMR_NM ,COALESCE(NULLIF(C.CSTMR_NATIVE_BIRTH,''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH,''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIRTH,'')) AS CSTMR_BIRTH ,R.CSTMR_TYPE_CD ,R.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD ,R.AGENT_CD ,NULL AS AGENT_NM ,R.SHOP_CD ,R.SHOP_NM ,R.MANAGER_CD AS MANAGER_NM ,NULL AS REGST_ID ,R.AMD_ID ,R.MEMO ,R.CONTRACT_NUM ,NULL AS CANCEL_MOBILE_NO ,R.RES_CD ,R.RES_MSG ,R.RES_NO FROM MSF_REQUEST R LEFT JOIN MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR C ON R.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY UNION ALL SELECT S.REQUEST_KEY ,S.CRET_DT ,'2' AS FORM_TYPE_CD ,NULL AS OPER_TYPE_CD ,S.PROC_CD ,C.CSTMR_NM ,COALESCE(NULLIF(C.CSTMR_NATIVE_BIRTH,''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH,''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIRTH,'')) AS CSTMR_BIRTH ,S.CSTMR_TYPE_CD ,NULL AS IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD ,S.AGENT_CD ,NULL AS AGENT_NM ,S.SHOP_CD ,S.SHOP_NM ,S.MANAGER_CD AS MANAGER_NM ,S.REGST_ID ,S.AMD_ID ,S.MEMO ,NULL AS CONTRACT_NUM ,S.CHG_MOBILE_NO AS CANCEL_MOBILE_NO ,S.RES_CD ,S.RES_MSG ,S.RES_NO FROM MSF_REQUEST_SVC_CHG S LEFT JOIN MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR C ON S.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY UNION ALL SELECT N.REQUEST_KEY ,N.CRET_DT ,'3' AS FORM_TYPE_CD ,N.OPER_TYPE_CD ,N.PROC_CD ,'' CSTMR_NM ,COALESCE(NULLIF(C.CSTMR_NATIVE_BIRTH,''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH,''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIRTH,'')) AS CSTMR_BIRTH ,N.CSTMR_TYPE_CD ,N.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD ,N.AGENT_CD ,NULL AS AGENT_NM ,N.SHOP_CD ,N.SHOP_NM ,N.MANAGER_CD AS MANAGER_NM ,N.REGST_ID ,N.AMD_ID ,N.MEMO ,NULL AS CONTRACT_NUM ,NULL AS CANCEL_MOBILE_NO ,N.RES_CD ,N.RES_MSG ,'' RES_NO FROM MSF_REQUEST_NAME_CHG N LEFT JOIN MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR C ON N.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY UNION ALL SELECT RC.REQUEST_KEY ,RC.CRET_DT ,'4' AS FORM_TYPE_CD ,RC.OPER_TYPE_CD ,RC.PROC_CD ,C.CSTMR_NM ,COALESCE(NULLIF(C.CSTMR_NATIVE_BIRTH,''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH,''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIRTH,'')) AS CSTMR_BIRTH ,RC.CSTMR_TYPE_CD ,RC.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD ,RC.AGENT_CD ,RC.AGENT_NM ,RC.SHOP_CD ,RC.SHOP_NM ,RC.MANAGER_NM ,RC.REGST_ID ,RC.AMD_ID ,RC.MEMO ,RC.CONTRACT_NUM ,RC.CANCEL_MOBILE_NO ,RC.RES_CD ,RC.RES_MSG ,RC.RES_NO FROM MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL RC LEFT JOIN MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR C ON RC.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY
mapper.select: SELECT RC.REQUEST_KEY, RC.CONTRACT_NUM, RC.CANCEL_MOBILE_NO, NULLIF( COALESCE(C.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN_NO, '') || COALESCE(C.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_NM_NO, '') || COALESCE(C.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN_NO, ''), '' ) AS RECEIVE_MOBILE_NO, C.CSTMR_NM, RC.CSTMR_TYPE_CD, RC.OPER_TYPE_CD, RC.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, RC.AGENT_CD, RC.SHOP_CD, RC.SHOP_NM, COALESCE(NULLIF(C.CSTMR_NATIVE_BIRTH, ''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_BIRTH, ''), NULLIF(C.CSTMR_JURIDICAL_BIRTH, '')) AS CSTMR_BIRTH, CASE WHEN RC.OPER_TYPE_CD IN ('CC', 'CANCEL', 'TERMINATION') THEN '서비스해지' WHEN RC.OPER_TYPE_CD IN ('N', 'NEW', 'NEW_JOIN', 'N01', 'NCHG') THEN '신규/변경(휴대폰 / 신규가입)' WHEN RC.OPER_TYPE_CD IN ('M', 'MNP', 'M01', 'NUM_MOVE') THEN '신규/변경(휴대폰 / 번호이동)' WHEN RC.OPER_TYPE_CD IN ('C', 'CHG', 'C01', 'DEVICE_CHG') THEN '신규/변경(휴대폰 / 기기변경)' WHEN RC.OPER_TYPE_CD IN ('U', 'USIM', 'USIM_NEW', 'U01') THEN '신규/변경(USIM / 신규가입)' ELSE COALESCE(RC.OPER_TYPE_CD, '-') END AS APPLY_TYPE_LABEL, CASE WHEN RC.CSTMR_TYPE_CD IN ('I', 'N', 'NATIVE') THEN '내국인' WHEN RC.CSTMR_TYPE_CD IN ('NM', 'M', 'MINOR') THEN '미성년자(19세 미만)' WHEN RC.CSTMR_TYPE_CD IN ('F', 'FOR', 'FOREIGN') THEN '외국인(Foreigner)' WHEN RC.CSTMR_TYPE_CD IN ('E', 'EXCEPTION') THEN '인증 예외' ELSE COALESCE(RC.CSTMR_TYPE_CD, '-') END AS CSTMR_TYPE_LABEL, CASE WHEN RC.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD IN ('KNOTE', 'K-NOTE', 'KNOTE_ID', 'KN') THEN 'K-NOTE인증' WHEN RC.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD IN ('FATH', 'FACE', 'FACE_AUTH') THEN '안면인증' WHEN RC.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD IN ('MOBILE', 'PASS', 'NICE', 'SMS') THEN '모바일인증' WHEN RC.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD IN ('E', 'EXCEPTION') THEN '인증 예외' ELSE COALESCE(RC.IDENTITY_CERT_TYPE_CD, '-') END AS AUTH_LABEL, RC.PROC_CD, CASE WHEN RC.PROC_CD = 'RC' THEN '접수완료' WHEN RC.PROC_CD = 'RQ' THEN '처리요청' WHEN RC.PROC_CD = 'CP' THEN '처리완료' WHEN RC.PROC_CD = 'BK' THEN '반려' ELSE COALESCE(RC.PROC_CD, '-') END AS PROC_CD_LABEL, TO_CHAR(RC.PROC_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS PROC_DT, TO_CHAR(RC.CRET_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CRET_DT, TO_CHAR(RC.AMD_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS AMD_DT, RC.AMD_ID, RC.MEMO, RC.MANAGER_NM, RC.AGENT_NM, RC.PAY_AMT, RC.PNLT_AMT, RC.LAST_SUM_AMT, RC.RES_CD, RC.RES_MSG, RC.RES_NO FROM MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL RC LEFT JOIN MSF_REQUEST_CSTMR C ON RC.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY WHERE RC.REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey}
mapper.update: UPDATE MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL SET PROC_CD = #{procCd}, RES_CD = #{resCd}, RES_MSG = #{resMsg}, RES_NO = #{resNo}, MEMO = #{memo}, AMD_ID = #{amdId}, AMD_DT = NOW() WHERE REQUEST_KEY = #{requestKey} AND PROC_CD != #{procCd}
